page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg5.4xlarge is a general-purpose instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon 6149 processor running at 3.1 GHz, utilizing the x86_64 architecture. The system is configured with 64.0 GB of RAM, providing 4.0 GB of memory per core. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, and it offers a baseline network bandwidth of 3 Gbps.

Benchmark data indicates a clear distinction between single-core and multi-core capabilities. Single-core performance is positioned in the bottom 25% across stress-ng, Geekbench, and gzip compression tests. Conversely, multi-core performance falls within the middle 50% for stress-ng, Geekbench, and Passmark CPU tests. Memory bandwidth, both cached and uncached, consistently ranks in the average tier, with uncached read speeds reaching 72.73 GB/sec.

The lack of local storage requires reliance on network-attached storage, which may impact I/O-heavy operations. While the instance handles multi-threaded tasks like bzip3 decompression and Redis SET operations with average efficiency, it exhibits weak performance on medium-sized LLM inference tasks. This hardware profile is best suited for general-purpose workloads, multi-threaded applications, and moderate web serving rather than single-threaded or heavy AI inference tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg5.4xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 16 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon 6149 processor running at 3.1 GHz, paired with 64.0 GB of RAM. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, this x86_64 server does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying instead on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 3 Gbps. Benchmark results show a significant performance tradeoff: single-core CPU execution and gzip compression are weak, ranking in the bottom 25%, while multi-core operations, memory bandwidth, and Redis SET throughput perform in the average tier. This resource configuration is suitable for balanced multi-threaded workloads, static web serving, and general-purpose applications that do not demand high single-core speed or local storage.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg5.4xlarge is a general-purpose instance with 16 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 64.0 GB of RAM, and 3 Gbps baseline network bandwidth, offering average multi-core performance.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg5.4xlarge features 16 dedicated Intel Xeon cores and 64.0 GB of RAM, delivering average multi-core and memory performance.
tagline: A dedicated sixteen-core x86_64 platform with balanced memory allocation, designed for multi-threaded workloads requiring steady baseline network performance.
